title: nie-jmap: JMAP bridge
description: Bridge nie rooms to JMAP-based mail/messaging servers. A bridge bot authenticates to a JMAP server, relays messages bidirectionally between nie MLS-encrypted rooms and JMAP mailboxes or threads. Users on either side can participate without adopting the same client.
close_reason: bridge-jmap crate complete: JMAP Email/query/get/set client, polling loop, 14 tests pass
